'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=s854LP0lZZA0tBO9S0DNokDcPOfFRId97l8X2lWAtlA-1770608226-1.0.1.1-hQ.IbHdNG9NWWnKFeguVnx17r7xUHr1yeY0lfMQj39A"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
